R0233.title: Collaboration Document Link Leakage
R0233.definition: Cloud drives, documents, IM files, or knowledge bases remain exposed for long periods through shared external links.
R0233.description: Cloud drives, documents, IM files, or knowledge bases remain exposed for long periods through shared external links.
R0233.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
